title: paspalum rectum
intro: Paspalum rectum, also known as Paspalum grass or Paspalum vaginatum, is a type of tropical grass native to the Americas, recognized for its distinctive shape and vibrant green color. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of fever. The health benefits of Paspalum grass include its potential to improve cardiovascular health and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Paspalum rectum can be made by drying the leaves and stems, then infusing them in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
